title: EnergyResourceEVCharger
description: Typed schema for EV charging station energy resources (type = EV_CHARGER or EV_V2G). EV_CHARGER is a flexible load at the grid connection point — NOT a storage resource. EV_V2G is a specialisation with ISO 15118-20 / OCPP 2.1 BPT bidirectional capability. CIM: ElectricVehicleChargingStation (CIM17+).

id.description: IES asset DID. Format: did:web:<domain>:assets:evse:<local-id>. Example: did:web:utility.com:assets:evse:EVSE-001

type.description: Asset-class discriminator. EV_CHARGER: unidirectional or AC bidirectional EVSE. EV_V2G: Vehicle-to-Grid capable EVSE (ISO 15118-20 / OCPP 2.1 BPT).

subResources.description: Child resources. Each item is a bare id string or an inline EnergyResourceEVCharger object.

parentResources.description: ids of parent resources (e.g. the meter this EVSE is behind).

GeoJSONGeometry.description: GeoJSON geometry per RFC 7946 / beckn GeoJSONGeometry/v2.0. Coordinates are [longitude, latitude] in WGS-84 (EPSG:4326).

Location.description: Physical location per beckn Location/2.0. geo (required) is a GeoJSONGeometry; address (optional) is a postal address.

EnergyResourceEVChargerAttributes.description: Attributes for EV_CHARGER and EV_V2G resources. Includes common fields (make, model, maxImportKw, maxExportKw, ratedPowerKw, telemetryProvider, commissioningDate, location) plus EVSE-specific fields.

ratedPowerKw.description: Manufacturer-rated peak power, kW. Kept for backward compatibility. Prefer maxImportKw.

maxImportKw.description: Maximum charge power drawn from the grid, kW. Always ≥0. CIM: PowerElectronicsConnection.maxP (absorption).

maxExportKw.description: Maximum V2G discharge power injected to the grid, kW. Always ≥0. Set for EV_V2G; omit or 0 for unidirectional EV_CHARGER. CIM: PowerElectronicsConnection.maxP (injection).

telemetryProvider.description: Vendor API / data source identifier for telemetry.

commissioningDate.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this EVSE was commissioned.

connectorType.description: Physical connector standard. Type1/Type2: IEC 62196. CCS1/CCS2: Combined Charging System (DC fast). CHAdeMO: CHAdeMO Association (DC, supports V2G). GB_T: Chinese GB/T 20234. NACS: North American Charging Standard (SAE J3400).

controlProtocol.description: EVSE control and smart-charging protocol. OCPP 2.1 adds ISO 15118-20 integration and BPT. ISO_15118_20 enables Plug-and-Charge and V2G.

v2xProtocol.description: V2G / V2X protocol. Present only for EV_V2G resources. CHAdeMO_V2G: CHAdeMO 2.0/3.0. CCS_BPT: CCS bidirectional. ISO_15118_20_AC/DC_BPT: ISO 15118-20 AC or DC bidirectional power transfer.
